debug_info.goal:
case swap
α : Type u_1
l1 l2 : List α
x y : α
l : List α
⊢ ∀ {idx1 : Fin (y :: x :: l).length} {idx2 : Fin (x :: y :: l).length},
    (y :: x :: l)[idx1] = (x :: y :: l)[idx2] → ((y :: x :: l).eraseIdx ↑idx1).Perm ((x :: y :: l).eraseIdx ↑idx2)

failed_attempts:
intros i1 i2 h
          let rec pull {α} (l : List α) (k : Fin l.length) : l.Perm (l[k] :: l.eraseIdx k) := match l, k with
            | _::_, ⟨0, _⟩ => List.Perm.refl _
            | y::ys, ⟨k+1, hk⟩ => (List.Perm.cons y (pull ys ⟨k, Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ hk⟩)).trans (List.Perm.swap _ _ _)
          let rec erase_eq {α} {l : List α} {i j : Fin l.length} (eq : l[i] = l[j]) : (l.eraseIdx i).Perm (l.eraseIdx j) := match l, i, j with
            | [], i, _ => i.elim0
            | _::_, ⟨0,_⟩, ⟨0,_⟩ => List.Perm.refl _
            | _::_, ⟨0,_⟩, ⟨j+1,hj⟩ => (pull _ ⟨j, Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ hj⟩).trans (by simp at eq; rw [eq]; exact List.Perm.refl _)
            | _::_, ⟨i+1,hi⟩, ⟨0,_⟩ => (pull _ ⟨i, Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ hi⟩).symm.trans (by simp at eq; rw [eq]; exact List.Perm.refl _)
            | y::ys, ⟨i+1,hi⟩, ⟨j+1,hj⟩ => by simp [List.eraseIdx]; exact List.Perm.cons y (erase_eq (by simp at eq; exact eq))
          rcases i1 with ⟨v1, h1⟩; rcases i2 with ⟨v2, h2⟩
          match v1, v2 with
          | 0, 0 => subst h; exact List.Perm.refl _
          | 0, 1 => exact List.Perm.refl _
          | 1, 0 => exact List.Perm.refl _
          | 1, 1 => subst h; exact List.Perm.refl _
          | 0, k+2 =>
            simp [List.eraseIdx] at h h2 ⊢; exact List.Perm.cons _ (pull l ⟨k, Nat.lt_of_add_lt_add_right h2⟩)
          | 1, k+2 =>
            simp [List.eraseIdx] at h h2 ⊢
            exact (List.Perm.cons _ (pull l ⟨k, Nat.lt_of_add_lt_add_right h2⟩)).trans (List.Perm.swap _ _ _)
          | k+2, 0 =>
            simp [List.eraseIdx] at h h1 ⊢; exact List.Perm.cons _ (pull l ⟨k, Nat.lt_of_add_lt_add_right h1⟩).symm
          | k+2, 1 =>
            simp [List.eraseIdx] at h h1 ⊢
            exact (List.Perm.swap _ _ _).trans (List.Perm.cons _ (pull l ⟨k, Nat.lt_of_add_lt_add_right h1⟩).symm)
          | k1+2, k2+2 =>
            simp [List.eraseIdx] at h h1 h2 ⊢
            exact (List.Perm.swap _ _ _).trans (List.Perm.cons _ (List.Perm.cons _ (erase_eq (by simp at h; exact h))))
